_comment: Working warm-earth-tone palette built from the 5 decorations discovered in 0.2.1 (Maraket Rubble, Maraket Treasures, Maraket Samovar, Maraket Ornament, Coastal Pebble) plus the original 4 Canal Hideout colours. All entries resolve to known hashes, so this file loads cleanly with `hideout-art img2hideout picture.png --palette examples/palette_warm.json`. Use it for desert scenes, wood/stone textures, autumn landscapes, or any source image dominated by warm browns, tans, and khakis. For cool-tone portraits (2B-style) use palette_2b.json instead.

_colour_sources.Maraket Rubble: median in-game RGB (138,120, 94), sampled from user export
_colour_sources.Maraket Treasures: median in-game RGB (108, 91, 83), sampled from user export
_colour_sources.Maraket Samovar: median in-game RGB (148,133,115), sampled from user export
_colour_sources.Maraket Ornament: median in-game RGB (136,120, 97), sampled from user export
_colour_sources.Coastal Pebble: median in-game RGB (134,115, 94), sampled from user export
_colour_sources.Long Grass: RGB (46,125,50) — from original Canal Hideout palette
_colour_sources.Falling Sand: RGB (248,187,208) — from original Canal Hideout palette
_colour_sources.Fringe Moss: RGB (139,195,74) — from original Canal Hideout palette
_colour_sources.Sand Tussock: RGB (78,52,46) — from original Canal Hideout palette

entries._role: warm tan/khaki (rubble, pebble, ornament — three near-identical options; we pick Rubble as the workhorse)
warm tan (alternate for textural variety, e.g. dithered areas)
warm tan (third tan option; use sparingly for noise)
